componentDescription: Renders a group of selectable options as buttons, managing user interactions and dynamic styling.

id.description: Unique identifier for the selector input.

error.description: Indicates if the selector is in an error state.

name.description: Name attribute for the selector input.

helperText.description: Supplementary text displayed below the selector.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when no option is selected.

options.description: Array of selectable options for the component. Each Option is { label: string; value: string; color?: string; }

isMulti.description: Determines if multiple options can be selected.

isReadOnly.description: Specifies if the selector is read-only.

isDisabled.description: Specifies if the selector is disabled.

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when the selected value changes.

shape.description: Defines the visual shape of the selector (e.g., rounded, square).

variant.description: Specifies the visual style or variant of the selector.

views.description: Custom styles to apply to different parts of the selector.

size.description: Defines the size of the selector (e.g., small, medium, large).

shadow.description: Applies a shadow effect to the selector.

isScrollable.description: Determines if the options dropdown should be scrollable.

value.description: The currently selected value(s) of the selector.

setValue.description: Function to update the selected value(s).

hide.description: Boolean indicating if the dropdown is hidden.

setHide.description: Function to control the visibility of the dropdown.

isHovered.description: Boolean indicating if the selector is currently hovered.

setIsHovered.description: Function to update the hover state.

isFocused.description: Boolean indicating if the selector is currently focused.

setIsFocused.description: Function to update the focus state.
